changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating organization_membership table for managing user memberships in organizations with roles.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create membership count trigger for organization_membership
changeSet.sql:
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS organization_membership_trigger ON organization_membership;
CREATE TRIGGER organization_membership_trigger AFTER INSERT OR DELETE ON organization_membership FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_membership_count();
